final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cross-border e-commerce promotional poster with typographic art and layered stacking text, designed for a 16:9 advertising banner format.

Style/medium: commercial promotional poster, bold editorial graphic design with artistic typography
Composition: 16:9 horizontal layout; layered type stacking fills the background with overlapping text at varying scales; a hero product (or product cluster) placed in the foreground physically overlaps and occludes portions of the stacked lettering, creating depth
Subject: cross-border e-commerce promotion — hero product(s) as the dominant foreground element breaking through the type layers
Scene/backdrop: abstract or gradient backdrop unified by dense stacked typographic layers; complex but visually ordered — each element has a clear hierarchy so the composition reads as intentional, not chaotic
Lighting/mood: energetic, commercial, attention-grabbing; strong contrast between product and background type layers
Color palette: bold, high-contrast promotional palette — vivid accent colors for artistic headline type against a darker or richly saturated background
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: artistic headline lettering (艺术字) must be present; stacked multi-layer typography (字体堆叠) must fill background; at least one product or subject element must visually overlap and partially obscure the background text; composition must be complex yet structured — not cluttered; final aspect ratio must be 16:9
Avoid: sparse or minimal layouts, single-layer flat text, generic stock-photo collage style, chaotic unreadable clutter
